externalProducts.aiDescription: We use AI to extract product details, attributes, and pricing from the API response. After fetching, you'll be able to review and map attributes to your system.
externalProducts.aiMappingAppliedDescription: AI has automatically mapped external attributes to your system attributes
externalProducts.aiMappingReviewDescription: Please review the AI-suggested attribute mappings before proceeding
externalProducts.categoryRequiredDescription: You must select a category before importing the product
externalProducts.connectionDescription: Connect this product to an imported external product so you can reuse mapped attributes and supplier prices.
externalProducts.connectionDialogDescription: Choose one of the imported external products. You can change the connection later.
externalProducts.connectionEmptyDescription: Select one of the imported external products to start mapping attributes and importing supplier prices.
externalProducts.connectionMissingProductDescription: The saved connection points to an external product that is no longer available. Choose a new connection to continue.
externalProducts.connectionNoImportedProducts: No imported external products are available yet. Import one first.
externalProducts.connectionNoSearchResults: No imported external products match your search.
externalProducts.connectionSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, provider, or URL…
externalProducts.createFromExternalDescription: Review and complete the form below. The data has been prefilled from the external source.
externalProducts.discountTooltip: Subtract discount percentage from fetched prices before tax
externalProducts.fetchPricesAlreadyRunningDescription: The background workflow is still fetching supplier prices for this product.
externalProducts.fetchPricesCancelledDescription: The background price fetch has been cancelled. You can start it again whenever you're ready.
externalProducts.fetchPricesStartedDescription: Fetching prices in the background. You can leave this page and come back later.
externalProducts.ignoredAttributeDescription: Ignore this supplier attribute. It will not add customer-facing options, sizes, or pricing values.
externalProducts.importDescription: Enter a product API endpoint to automatically fetch product information, attributes, and specifications.
externalProducts.importPricesApplyPendingFirst: Apply pending supplier prices before importing them into this product.
externalProducts.importPricesToProductFailed: Failed to import prices to product
externalProducts.importPricesToProductSuccessDescription: Updated {{groups}} price groups from {{count}} imported prices.
externalProducts.importPricesUnavailable: Fetch and apply supplier prices before importing them into this product.
externalProducts.importPricesWhileRefreshing: Wait until the price refresh finishes before importing.

importProgress.hint: Some providers take longer than others. Keep this page open while we finish the import.

analyzing.description: Extracting the name, images, attributes, and specifications.
analyzing.title: Analyzing product details

fetching.description: Downloading the product payload and any provider-specific details.
fetching.title: Fetching provider data

mapping.description: Generating suggested mappings between external data and your catalog.
mapping.title: Preparing attribute mappings

saving.description: Wrapping up the import and saving the product in Konfi.
saving.title: Saving imported product

importProgress.title: Importing {{name}}…

importWarnings.allPricesZero: All supplier price values are 0. This usually means the pricing API returns per-unit prices that were incorrectly treated as total prices during extraction. Try re-fetching supplier prices to trigger automatic correction.
importWarnings.attributeRemovedImpossible: Attribute "{{name}}" was removed because dependency rules make it unreachable. This usually means a parent attribute was skipped or has incompatible options.
importWarnings.attributeSkippedNoOptions: Attribute "{{name}}" was skipped because no option values could be resolved from the supplier data. Check the option mappings for this attribute.
importWarnings.basePriceRangesOnly: Found {{count}} base price range(s) but no per-configuration prices.
importWarnings.categoryRequired: Category must be assigned before product can be published.
importWarnings.matrixNoAttributes: Price type is MATRIX but no attributes were mapped. Prices may not display correctly.
importWarnings.noAttributeMappings: {{count}} supplier price configuration(s) available but no attribute mappings are set. Set up attribute mappings on the external product before importing.
importWarnings.noAttributesMapped: No attributes mapped — product may need manual attribute configuration.
importWarnings.noCombinationsMapped: Matrix prices were resolved but no attribute combinations could be mapped. Check attribute mappings.
importWarnings.noPriceData: No supplier price data found. Fetch supplier prices first, then try importing again.
importWarnings.noPriceRanges: No price ranges available — the product will have placeholder pricing. Check that supplier prices have been fetched.
importWarnings.noVolumeTiers: No volume tiers could be extracted from the supplier data.
importWarnings.priceResolutionSummary: Resolved {{priceCount}} price(s) across {{combinationCount}} combination(s) and {{volumeCount}} volume tier(s). Sample price value: {{sampleValue}}.
importWarnings.unsupportedCurrency: Supplier currency "{{currency}}" is not a valid ISO currency code. Imported placeholder prices use PLN until the currency is corrected.
importWarnings.unmappedConfigurations: Mapped {{mapped}}/{{total}} supplier price configurations to attribute combinations. {{unmapped}} could not be matched.
importWarnings.zeroPricesResolved: Price type is {{priceType}} but resolved 0 prices from {{configCount}} configuration(s) and {{rangeCount}} range(s). Attribute mappings may not match the supplier data.

externalProducts.listDescription: Review and manage products fetched from external sources
externalProducts.manualUrlPlaceholder: Or paste a direct product URL...
externalProducts.mappingAlertDescription: Review and save every supplier attribute mapping before importing prices into this product. Each attribute can be mapped, kept for supplier pricing only, or ignored.
externalProducts.mappingCustomInputDescription: This is a provider custom input without predefined values. It won't block product creation and is skipped in customer-facing attribute mapping.
externalProducts.mappingDescription: Map external attributes to internal attributes and options.
externalProducts.mappingDuplicateCardDescription: {{attribute}} is also mapped from {{externalAttributes}}. Each internal attribute can only be used once.
externalProducts.mappingDuplicateDescription: Each internal attribute can only be mapped once. Resolve duplicates for: {{mappings}}.
externalProducts.mappingDuplicateSelectionDescription: "{{attribute}}" is already mapped to "{{externalAttribute}}". Choose another internal attribute.
externalProducts.mappingRequired: Resolve every attribute before creating the product. Supplier attributes can be mapped, used for provider pricing only, or ignored.
externalProducts.mappingSyntheticDerivedExternalValueHelp: Detected from the provider response as a selectable empty branch. Create or map the matching internal option manually if needed.
externalProducts.mappingSyntheticEmptyExternalValueHelp: Use this when the provider does not expose a real option and omits the attribute instead.
externalProducts.marginTooltip: Add margin percentage to fetched prices
externalProducts.noAppliedPricesAlertDescription: Refresh supplier prices, review them, and apply them before importing prices into this product.
externalProducts.noProductsFound: No products found. The provider may not have an all-products endpoint, or the catalog is empty.
externalProducts.pendingReviewAlertDescription: {{count}} supplier price configurations are waiting. Apply them before importing prices into this product.
externalProducts.pendingReviewAlertTitle: Pending supplier prices are ready for review
externalProducts.priceFetchModeTooltip: Choose whether to reuse matching fetched supplier configurations or refetch every supplier configuration.

extracting.description: Parsing provider responses into Konfi price configurations.
extracting.title: Extracting price data

fetching.description: Requesting price data for each provider configuration.
fetching.title: Fetching provider prices

preparing.description: Counting provider configurations and preparing the request list.
preparing.title: Preparing configurations

queued.description: Starting the durable price-fetch workflow so it can continue in the background.
queued.title: Queueing background workflow

saving.description: Saving fetched price configurations back to the external product.
saving.title: Saving fetched prices

externalProducts.pricingExclusionsAssistantAppliedDescrip: {{count}} rules added. Save mappings to persist them.
externalProducts.pricingExclusionsAssistantDescription: Describe supplier options that make other options invalid. The assistant will turn the description into draft exclusion rules for this mapped product.
externalProducts.pricingExclusionsAssistantPromptPlacehol: Example: cover paper cannot be heavier than inner paper; no cover lamination excludes selective varnish and foil…
externalProducts.pricingExclusionsDescription: Build supplier fetch rules manually. When the selected mapped supplier values match, the chosen supplier attributes will be omitted from generated price-fetch configurations.
externalProducts.pricingExclusionsExcludeValuesHelp: Optionally pick exact supplier values to exclude. Leave all values unselected to exclude the whole attribute.
externalProducts.pricingExclusionsSelectValues: Select one or more supplier values
externalProducts.pricingExclusionsValidationError: Pick at least one complete trigger condition and one supplier attribute or value to exclude.
externalProducts.pricingExclusionsWhen: When all of these supplier values match
externalProducts.providerDescription: Configure external providers with API endpoints for product import
externalProducts.providerHelp: Select a provider to load its product catalog and apply auth headers.
externalProducts.pageCountAttributeDescription: Use this supplier attribute as product page count. It will not become a customer-facing product option.
externalProducts.providerOnlyPricingDescription: Use this supplier attribute only when fetching supplier prices. It will not become a customer-facing product option.
externalProducts.providerProductsEmpty: No products loaded yet. Click to fetch the provider catalog.
externalProducts.refreshInProgressAlertDescription: The background workflow is still fetching supplier prices. Import will be available when it finishes.
externalProducts.refreshPricesForReviewAlreadyRunningDesc: The background workflow is still refreshing prices for this product.
externalProducts.refreshPricesForReviewCancelledDescripti: The background price refresh has been cancelled. You can start it again whenever you're ready.
externalProducts.refreshPricesForReviewStartedDescription: Refreshing prices in the background. You can leave this page and come back later.
externalProducts.selectProductDescription: Choose a provider and click on a product to import it.
externalProducts.syncImportConfirmDescription: This replaces the current product attribute setup with the mapped external attributes and overwrites imported price groups for this product.
externalProducts.syncImportConfirmTitle: Sync mapped attributes & import applied prices?
externalProducts.urlHelp: Paste the API endpoint URL for the product you want to import
